creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port imported. 

The following significant changes were made: 

Set ${MAKEFILE}, rephrase DESCR from the .lsm, since they have very similar 
purposes and the .lsm seemed a better DESCR, <ahem> add homepage to pkg/ 
pkg/DESCR. 

DO NOT (ever!!) RUN_DEPEND or BUILD_DEPEND on ${PREFIX}/bin/tclsh!!  Doing 
so will make me very angry with you!  :)  If you have a tclsh anywhere on 
your computer, you should remove it now, unless it is the tclsh installed 
by the tcl ports. 

Thanks!
